tasks.label: build: fast
tasks.detail: .NET inner loop: build Release without analyzers (run restore once first; never substitutes for the full build).

tasks.label: coverage
tasks.detail: .NET: run tests with coverage and generate a report.
tasks.command: dotnet tool restore && dotnet test DialogueDown.sln --settings coverage.runsettings --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" && dotnet reportgenerator "-reports:tests/DialogueDown.Tests/TestResults/**/coverage.cobertura.xml" "-targetdir:coverage-report" "-reporttypes:Html;MarkdownSummary;Cobertura"

tasks.label: web: check
tasks.detail: Frontend: typecheck, lint, style, format, and unit tests (Vitest).

tasks.label: web: e2e
tasks.detail: Frontend: Playwright end-to-end + accessibility tests (builds first).

tasks.label: build: all
tasks.detail: Build both the .NET solution and the web report.

tasks.label: verify: all
tasks.detail: Run every check: .NET tests, web check, and web e2e.

tasks.label: clean
tasks.detail: Remove build/test artifacts (keeps node_modules and the committed report).
tasks.command: dotnet clean DialogueDown.sln --nologo && rm -rf coverage-report TestResults src/DialogueDown.Visualization/web/playwright-report src/DialogueDown.Visualization/web/test-results src/DialogueDown.Visualization/web/coverage src/DialogueDown.Visualization/web/.vite

tasks.label: docs: lint oss markdown
tasks.command: markdownlint README.md CONTRIBUTING.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md SECURITY.md CHANGELOG.md .github/pull_request_template.md

tasks.label: docs: check links
tasks.command: lychee --no-progress --timeout 10 README.md CONTRIBUTING.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md SECURITY.md CHANGELOG.md .github/pull_request_template.md
